occupation: CEO and co-founder at Alight Media
headline: CEO, entrepreneur, and adviser
summary:
An accomplished leader who inspires people to achieve lasting change and transform results. Clear strategic vision founded in customer understanding. Strong management disciplines and intellectual rigour, paired with vision, insight, empathy and passion drive outstanding execution. Proven track record of success in both public and private equity businesses, across TMT and in FMCG; repeatedly promoted by every employer. Particularly relishes tough challenges and turn-arounds.

Specialties: Setting and delivering strategy, implementing change programmes and providing strong leadership for people and teams by ensuring clear direction and inspiring greater achievement. Leadership qualities are: passion, determination, energy, vision, strategy and fairness.

experiences.title: CEO and co-founder
experiences.description: A new media owner applying positive digital attitudes to offline media. Building a challenger brand in out-of-home.

experiences.title: Consultant, adviser and coach
experiences.description: Enabling clients to give leadership and clarity by bringing industry-leading experience and expertise. This gives our clients deep understanding and insight, enabling smarter decisions and accelerating delivery. Most of our work relates to marketing, advertising, media, programmatic media and ad tech. We bring particular experience and expertise in leadership and change, creating constructive disruption including digitisation, high growth and turn-around situations.

experiences.title: President, Europe
experiences.description: Responsible for Clear Channel’s business in 18 European countries, part of a global private equity-owned group. Includes both mature and higher growth (emerging) markets; some businesses in turn-around, others stable and successful. Continuing responsibility for UK, promoted from CEO to Chair; and all International HQ operating functions incl. Sales, Marketing, IT and HR.

experiences.title: Chief Executive
experiences.description: Chief Executive at leading out-of-home media owner Clear Channel UK and member of Clear Channel International's Executive Committee. Responsible for the company's vision, strategy and plans for growth; managing more than 650 employees in the UK across Sales, Marketing, Operations, Finance, IT, HR, Legal and Development.

experiences.title: Marketing Director
experiences.description: Marketing Director for BT's Consumer business responsible for acquiring, keeping and in-life marketing to over 10m customers. This involved overseeing overall marketing strategy, agency relationships, campaign development and through-the-line execution, media buying and responsibility for a nine-figure marketing budget.

experiences.title: General Manager: Directory Enquiries, Operator & Emergency Services
Director of Telephony
experiences.description: Held several roles in digital TV and telephony at Telewest Broadband including Director of Telephony and Change Management. Responsible for overseeing the launch of the first enhanced TV service on digital cable.

experiences.title: Brand Manager and Assistant Brand Manager

education.activities_and_societies:
Activities and Societies: Vice-President Edinburgh University Students' Association (elected sabbatical position)
Editor Student newspaper
